name: Glass Cylinder Canister Set of 4 - Threshold™
description: Great for storing sugar, flour, grains, coffee beans or pasta noodles, these Threshold Glass Cylinder Canisters will look great on your countertop or tucked away in your pantry. This 4 piece set has canisters in different sizes, each with a twist-off lid that offers an airtight seal to keep the contents fresh.
